title: verbascum thapsus f. candicans
intro: Verbascum thapsus f. candicans, also known as White Mullein, is a biennial plant species belonging to the figwort family that is native to Europe and Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of White Mullein include reducing inflammation, soothing coughs, and improving sleep quality. Herbal preparations of White Mullein can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
